adaptation: Retained contextual routing and independent variance/motion/density dials; removed universal default values and unsupported quantitative claims.
Condensed macrostructure and structural-fingerprint concepts; removed recipe-specific and novelty-first absolutes.
Adapted art-direction, hero-composition, typography, and anti-generic checks into contextual guidance that preserves truth, accessibility, and product fit.

Added a height-aware landing-page guard that budgets fixed chrome, required entry content, actions, and next-section reveal at short desktop and mobile profiles without imposing a universal font-size cap.
Reframed image-generation guidance as an optional asset loop for concrete subjects, with explicit limits against synthetic evidence.
Converted source self-critique rubrics into a short private design pass focused on concept, hierarchy, execution, specificity, restraint, and variety.
Re-authored a smaller structured taxonomy with applicability, warnings, exceptions, and no executable lookup system.
Converted universal bans into contextual warnings; retained hard failures only for correctness, accessibility, honesty, and behavior.
Normalized overlapping checklists into a smaller evidence-based gate set and aligned accessibility requirements to WCAG 2.2.
Combined mobile recomposition guidance with standards-based reflow, zoom, focus, and target requirements.
Added explicit untrusted-content, path, protocol, Markdown, and execution controls not treated consistently by the source skills.
